project_type: React SPA (Vite) with AWS backend (API Gateway + Lambda + Cognito + DynamoDB)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` in the grape directory to confirm the project compiles without errors
snapshot_or_generated_files: grape/dist/ - generated by vite build, not checked in (.gitignore)
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. Node.js + npm available.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Pages live in src/pages/<Category>/<PageName>.jsx with matching CSS files. Components in src/components/<Name>/index.jsx. Auth uses AWS Cognito via src/lib/auth.js (direct API calls, no SDK). API calls use src/lib/api.js with { data, error } pattern. Layout uses BaseLayout component with header, breadcrumbs, title props. Protected routes use ProtectedRoute component wrapper. Menu is data-driven from defaultMenuItems array in src/components/Menu/index.jsx.
directory_structure: grape/src/pages/ - page components grouped by category (About, Admin, Cases, Customer_Service, etc). grape/src/components/ - reusable components. grape/src/lib/ - utility modules (auth.js, api.js). grape/src/contexts/ - React contexts (AuthContext). grape/src/assets/ - images and static assets.
